This repository is a workshop for GitHub Copilot, not a production application.

Optimize for clarity, teaching value, and repeatable demos.

Keep the numbered workshop sections presentation-friendly and concise.

Keep examples runnable on a local machine with minimal setup.

Do not introduce Git workflow, pull request, CI/CD, or deployment topics unless explicitly asked.

When editing sample projects, preserve simple commands, readable code, and beginner-friendly naming.
